caustica.options.rt.exposureMode.tooltip: How the ray-traced image is mapped to display brightness. Auto adapts to scene luminance; Manual uses the exposure value directly.
caustica.options.rt.manualEv.tooltip: Exposure compensation in stops. In Manual, this is the fixed exposure. In Auto, this biases the auto exposure brighter or darker.
caustica.options.rt.sdrTonemap.tooltip: How the ray-traced image is mapped to the SDR main target. AgX preserves Caustica's existing look.
caustica.options.rt.spp.tooltip: Path-tracing samples taken per pixel each frame. Higher is cleaner but more demanding.
caustica.options.rt.maxBounces.tooltip: Maximum number of secondary path-tracing bounces after the primary hit. Higher captures more indirect light but costs more.
caustica.options.rt.sunSize.tooltip: Angular radius of the sun and moon disk. Larger discs cast softer shadow penumbrae.
caustica.options.rt.entities.tooltip: Include entities and block entities in the ray-traced scene.
caustica.options.rt.particles.tooltip: Draw particles as camera-ray billboards inside the traced scene.
caustica.options.rt.glow.tooltip: Draw the vanilla Glowing-effect outline (through walls) around glowing entities.
caustica.options.rt.waterWaves.tooltip: Animate water-surface normals for moving wave highlights.
caustica.options.rt.hdr.tooltip: Present in HDR (ST.2084/PQ) instead of SDR, when the display supports it. Takes effect after restarting the game.
caustica.options.rt.hdrTonemap.tooltip: How the HDR image is mapped to the PQ swapchain. BT.2390 EETF is the standards-based default; Caustica Rolloff preserves the original behavior.
Highlight rolloff for the PsychoV tone mapper. Higher values compress bright areas more.
caustica.options.rt.hdrPsychoShadows.too: Shadow shaping for the PsychoV tone mapper. Higher values reveal more shadow detail.
caustica.options.rt.hdrPsychoContrast.to: S-curve contrast for the PsychoV tone mapper. 1.0 is neutral.
caustica.options.rt.hdrPsychoPurity.tool: Color purity for the PsychoV tone mapper. Higher values preserve more vivid color.
caustica.options.rt.sdrPsychoPeak.toolti: Peak reference for SDR PsychoV. Higher values preserve more highlight detail.
caustica.options.rt.hdrPaperWhite.toolti: Absolute brightness (in nits) that SDR-equivalent scene brightness maps to on an HDR display.
caustica.options.rt.hdrPeak.tooltip: Absolute brightness (in nits) highlights roll off toward. Set to your display's peak HDR brightness.
caustica.options.rt.dlssQuality.tooltip: DLSS Ray Reconstruction quality mode. Lower-quality modes render fewer pixels and upscale more aggressively for higher framerates; higher-quality modes render more pixels for a sharper image. Only affects the image when DLSS Ray Reconstruction is enabled.
caustica.options.rt.debugView.tooltip: Visualize an intermediate ray-tracing buffer instead of the final image.
caustica.options.rt.tonemapping.tooltip: Open SDR and HDR tone-mapping controls.
caustica.options.rt.tonemapping.title: Tone Mapping
caustica.options.rt.sdrAgxContrast.toolt: Contrast applied after AgX tone mapping. 1.0 preserves the original Caustica SDR look.
caustica.options.rt.sdrAgxSaturation.too: Saturation applied after AgX tone mapping. 1.0 preserves the original Caustica SDR look.
caustica.options.rt.sdrPbrStartCompressi: Scene-linear level where PBR Neutral starts compressing highlights toward display white.
caustica.options.rt.sdrPbrDesaturation.t: Amount of highlight desaturation used by PBR Neutral.
caustica.options.rt.sdrReinhardWhitePoin: White point for extended Reinhard. Higher values preserve more highlight headroom.
caustica.options.rt.sdrAcesExposure.tool: Input scale for the ACES fitted curve.
caustica.options.rt.sdrLottesContrast.to: Contrast exponent used by the Lottes filmic curve.
caustica.options.rt.sdrLottesShoulder.to: Highlight shoulder exponent used by the Lottes filmic curve.
caustica.options.rt.sdrLottesHdrMax.tool: Scene-linear peak reference for the Lottes filmic curve.
caustica.options.rt.sdrLottesMidIn.toolt: Input middle gray reference for the Lottes filmic curve.
caustica.options.rt.sdrLottesMidOut.tool: Output middle gray target for the Lottes filmic curve.
caustica.options.rt.sdrFrostbiteLinearEn: End of the linear range before the Frostbite shoulder begins.
caustica.options.rt.sdrFrostbiteShoulder: Strength of the Frostbite highlight shoulder.
caustica.options.rt.sdrUnchartedA.toolti: Shoulder strength coefficient for the Uncharted 2 curve.
caustica.options.rt.sdrUnchartedB.toolti: Linear strength coefficient for the Uncharted 2 curve.
caustica.options.rt.sdrUnchartedC.toolti: Linear angle coefficient for the Uncharted 2 curve.
caustica.options.rt.sdrUnchartedD.toolti: Toe strength coefficient for the Uncharted 2 curve.
caustica.options.rt.sdrUnchartedE.toolti: Toe numerator coefficient for the Uncharted 2 curve.
caustica.options.rt.sdrUnchartedF.toolti: Toe denominator coefficient for the Uncharted 2 curve.
caustica.options.rt.sdrUnchartedWhitePoi: White point used to normalize the Uncharted 2 curve.
caustica.options.rt.sdrGtContrast.toolti: Contrast exponent for the GT tone-mapping curve.
caustica.options.rt.sdrGtLinearStart.too: Start of the GT curve's middle linear segment.
caustica.options.rt.sdrGtLinearLength.to: Length of the GT curve's middle linear segment.
caustica.options.rt.sdrGtBlackCurve.tool: Toe shape exponent for the GT tone-mapping curve.
caustica.options.rt.sdrGtBlackLift.toolt: Black-level lift applied by the GT tone-mapping curve.
caustica.options.rt.hdrPsychoBleaching.t: Amount of bright-color bleaching in PsychoV.
Amount of source hue restored after PsychoV compression.
White compression curve used by PsychoV.
caustica.options.rt.hdrPsychoConeExponen: Exponent applied in the PsychoV cone-response stage.
